{"id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.3","title":"Python impl: Gateway-centric announce suppression","description":"Implement gateway-centric announce suppression in Python node.

## Files to modify
- python/src/lichen/announce/scheduler.py - dynamic interval based on DODAG state
- python/src/lichen/rpl/ (if exists) - track DODAG membership, parse gateway-centric flag
- python/src/lichen/node.py - wire DODAG state to announce scheduler

## Changes
1. AnnounceScheduler accepts DODAG state callback or observable
2. When DODAG joined + gateway-centric: interval = 1800 sec (or disabled)
3. When DODAG lost: interval = 300 sec within 60 sec
4. Parse gateway-centric flag from received DIO

## Constants
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_NORMAL = 300 sec
- ANNOUNCE_INTERVAL_GATEWAY = 1800 sec
- DODAG_LOSS_RESUME_TIMEOUT = 60 sec","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:30.397649Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:30.397649Z","labels":["python","implementation","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:30.555578Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-dk3c.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T17:23:30.685909Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added gateway_centric to DodagState, updated scheduler to support dynamic intervals via callback to DODAG state for gateway-centric mode detection and scheduler reschedule on DIO/DODAG loss. LOADng fallback confirmed in routing. Tests updated. Matches spec 9.10.
